promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch in folder order after the archived low-entropy-library reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates a clean archived A2 identity and A2-versus-B boundary packet while also marking its topology and save wording as time-bounded.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The archived behavioral-boundary batch and the archived low-entropy canon-boundary batch were used to keep this tiny plaque inside its neighboring doctrine cluster rather than over-trusting it in isolation.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until this smaller adjacent archived system-spec plaque was reduced into a compact reusable packet.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived system-spec parent batch plus the neighboring archived behavioral and low-entropy A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable role, boundary, topology, and save/transport packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVED_SYSTEM_SPEC_PLAQUE_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the file as a compact archived boundary plaque without letting its clarity self-authorize current doctrine.

candidate_items.name: NONCANON_A2_OUTER_LAYER_IDENTITY_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the plaque's clearest A2 identity statement while keeping it explicitly archived and noncanon.

candidate_items.name: A2_VS_THREAD_B_RATCHET_BOUNDARY_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest reusable doctrine split between A2 ratcheting and Thread-B ratcheting.

candidate_items.name: SAVE_DURABILITY_WITHOUT_TRANSPORT_ELEVATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest save-versus-transport separation in the plaque while blocking mutation-authority overread.

candidate_items.name: THREE_DOC_CORE_AS_TIME_BOUNDED_MEMORY_TOPOLOGY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the plaque's clearest topology caution by keeping the three-doc core explicitly time-bounded.

candidate_items.name: PLAQUE_REQUIRES_THICKER_DOCTRINE_CONTEXT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest guard against over-trusting this tiny self-spec without the surrounding archived doctrine cluster.

quarantined_items.name: ARCHIVED_VERB_SET_AS_CURRENT_ACTIVE_A2_CAPABILITY_INTERFACE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The plaque's compact verb set is archived identity wording, not a current active capability interface.

quarantined_items.name: THREE_DOC_CORE_AS_CURRENT_ACTIVE_A2_SURFACE_SET
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly marks the three-doc core as time-bounded rather than a standing interface claim.

quarantined_items.name: FULL_SNAPSHOT_ZIP_WORDING_AS_CURRENT_SAVE_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The old durability wording is archive history and cannot outrank later save/transport distinctions.

quarantined_items.name: PLAQUE_COMPRESSION_AS_SUFFICIENT_OPERATIONAL_SPEC
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The plaque omits most operational nuance and remains insufficient as a standalone spec.

quarantined_items.name: TRANSPORT_ARTIFACTS_AS_RATCHET_STATE_OR_MUTATION_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly denies ratchet-state status to transport artifacts and does not let durability tools grant mutation authority.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest archived A2 identity, A2-versus-B boundary, time-bounded topology, and save/transport separation packets from the parent batch.
They preserve the plaque as compact archived doctrine history while blocking overread of its compressed wording as current active law.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain current-interface overreads, time-bounded topology overreads, or outdated save-doctrine projections rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the archived behavioral-boundary and low-entropy canon-boundary A2-mid batches as neighboring doctrine-cluster anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived system-spec reduction pass.
